name: Fae | Unlikely Marriage
description:
A kid you use to bully back in High School, now your arranged lover.... (You've long since forgotten who she was, since it's been years since high school)

Creator Note: If the meter at the bottom doesn’t move, or goes up by over 0.5, change the value yourself. The first response should remain 0, then the next will get to 1, after that change the ai will adapt(usually)

UPDATED(1/27/2026): So I couldn’t find the original image, decided to just remake it. Not the same but meh it’s close enough.
